title: Create: Structures Molo
description: This mod adds new structures to minecraft with the Create mod and its addons.
body:
[![modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_64h.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-structures-molo) [![forge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/supported/forge_64h.png)](https://files.minecraftforge.net/net/minecraftforge/forge/index_1.20.1.html)
# English Description

## This mod adds new structures.

You may encounter abandoned factories, buildings, trains, etc.  

You can learn the plot from the survivor books that you can find in the structures themselves. You can also find rich loot in chests and barrels. 

## The following mods are required to run the mod :
- [**Create 0.5.1.j**](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)
- [**Create: Deco**](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-deco)
- [**Create: Steam 'n' Rails**](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-steam-n-rails)
- [**Create: Copycats+**](https://modrinth.com/mod/copycats)
- [**Create: Big Cannons**](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-big-cannons)
- [**Create: New Age**](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-new-age)
- [**Create: Diesel Generators**](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-diesel-generators)
- [**Sinytra Connector**](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector)
- [**Oculus**](https://modrinth.com/mod/oculus)
- [**CBCModernWarfare**](https://modrinth.com/mod/cbcmodernwarfare)

For versions below 0.4, an additional mod is required
[**Create: Radars**](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-radars)

The mod is still in Beta and you may encounter bugs due to this. If you find an error or bug, you can send it to us. We will review and fix it in the next version of the mod: **createstructuresmolo@gmail.com**

![eng_ydachi](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4c04eeafd68cc6f30eb084ffbcf0566515724ed8.png)

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Русское описание

## Данный мод добавляет новые структуры. 

Вы можете встретить заброшеные заводы, здания, поезда и т.д.  

Вы можете узнать сюжет из книг выживших которые можете найти в самих структурах. Также можете найти богатый лут в сундуках и бочках. 

## Для запуска мода требуются следующие моды :
- [**Create 0.5.1.j**](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)
- [**Create: Deco**](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-deco)
- [**Create: Steam 'n' Rails**](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-steam-n-rails)
- [**Create: Copycats+**](https://modrinth.com/mod/copycats)
- [**Create: Big Cannons**](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-big-cannons)
- [**Create: New Age**](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-new-age)
- [**Create: Diesel Generators**](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-diesel-generators)
- [**Sinytra Connector**](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector)
- [**Oculus**](https://modrinth.com/mod/oculus)
- [**CBCModernWarfare**](https://modrinth.com/mod/cbcmodernwarfare)

Для версий ниже 0.4 требуется дополнительный мод
[**Create: Radars**](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-radars)

Телеграм канал. Там будут публиковаться новости :
- **[ТГ Канал Новости](https://t.me/CreateStructuresMolo)**
- **[ТГ Чат](https://t.me/+MWr9PuBceIIyNjMy)**

Мод пока что находится в Бете и за этого вы можете столкнуться с багами. Если нашли ошибку или баг можете его прислать нам мы рассмотрим и починим в следующей версии мода: **createstructuresmolo@gmail.com**

![rus_ydachi](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c96b8af58bdad4cd12b0c0736e70f017956ce9b8.png)
